title: Find contracts in technology and research and development with the Ministry of Defence
body: "Every year the Ministry of Defence (MOD) works with companies and researchers to develop next-generation innovation, technology and digital solutions to support our frontline troops. You can find some of the places we advertise those opportunities on this page. This is not an exhaustive list.  Opportunities outside the technology and innovation space can be found at Procurement at MOD.  To get notified every time this page gets updated sign up for email updates.  To give feedback on this page, please contact the Commercial X team at defcomrcl-comrclx@mod.gov.uk.  Guidance for new suppliers  A common way for suppliers to bid for contracts is via online platforms known as frameworks. These are usually set up to help government buy a specific type of product or service, and have standard terms and processes which make it easier to contract with us. Once you are on a framework you can apply for any advertised opportunities until the framework ends.   Some frameworks are ‘open’, which means they can be joined at any time, while others are only open during certain periods. There also dynamic markets which are similar to frameworks and are always open to join.  Current opportunities  GOV.UK     What Buying categories Open to new entrants Register or find out more Notes      Find a Tender (also known as Central Digital Platform) All types of goods and services Yes No registration needed – search for contracts  The main source of advertised government contracts.     Ministry of Defence     What Buying categories Open to new entrants Register or find out more Notes     Defence Sourcing Portal All types of goods and services Yes Register for Defence Sourcing Portal Main source of advertised Ministry of Defence contracts   Drones and Associated Services Dynamic Purchasing System (DPS) Drones (UAVs) and associated products and services to support emergency services and other public bodies Yes Find out more about Drones and Associated Services DPS DPS ends on 6 March 2027   Neutral Vendor Framework for Innovation (NVFi)  R&D covering 14 categories from AI to Internet of Things Yes Register to join the NVFi on Constellia’s website Contracts up to £50 million   R-Cloud: Marketplace for Defence Science and Technology Research  R&D covering 22 categories from robotics to advanced materials Yes Register for R-Cloud 70% of suppliers are smaller businesses – retention of intellectual property is supported   Analysis for Science and Technology Research in Defence (ASTRID) Framework Analysis services covering 12 categories from data science to statistics Yes  Find out more about (ASTRID). Framework ends on 8 April 2027   Commercial X Dynamic Market New innovations at any development stage, from concepts to finalised solutions Yes Apply via the Defence Sourcing Portal Open to organisations of all types and sizes and from any industry   Weapons Sector Research Framework (WSRF) Research and development of emerging and disruptive weapons Yes Find out more about WSRF on the QinetiQ website Ends on 31/03/2027   Hypersonic Technologies and Capability Development Framework (HTCDF)  R&D in military aircrafts; missiles and spacecrafts; software and hardware; consultancy, test and evaluation; training and simulation No  Find out more about HTCDF and on the Defence Sourcing Portal once framework is re-opened....
